title: selaginella caffrorum
intro: Selaginella caffrorum, also known as the Caffro Spikemoss, is a type of ancient plant species belonging to the Selaginellaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Selaginella caffrorum include its potential to reduce blood pressure, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from skin irritations. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or capsules, which are often used in traditional medicine to harness its therapeutic benefits.
